ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm type */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm subtype */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is public or private */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the algorithm */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm's author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES algorithm_subtypes ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complexities" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "time_complexity" TEXT /* Time complexity of the algorithm (e.g., O(n^3)) */,
  "space_complexity" TEXT /* Space complexity of the algorithm (e.g., O(n^2)) */,
  "best_case_time_complexity" TEXT /* Best-case time complexity of the algorithm */,
  "worst_case_time_complexity" TEXT /* Worst-case time complexity of the algorithm */,
  "average_case_time_complexity" TEXT /* Average-case time complexity of the algorithm */,
  "best_case_space_complexity" TEXT /* Best-case space complexity of the algorithm */,
  "worst_case_space_complexity" TEXT /* Worst-case space complexity of the algorithm */,
  "average_case_space_complexity" TEXT /* Average-case space complexity of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complexities_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., addition, multiplication) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the operation */,
  "operation_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the operation */,
  "operation_cost" REAL /* Cost of the operation in terms of computational resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_usage" (
  "memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory usage entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage of the algorithm (e.g., 2n^2+2n) */,
  "best_case_memory_usage" TEXT /* Best-case memory usage of the algorithm */,
  "worst_case_memory_usage" TEXT /* Worst-case memory usage of the algorithm */,
  "average_case_memory_usage" TEXT /* Average-case memory usage of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usage_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "input_size" INTEGER /* Size of the input used for benchmarking */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the algorithm on the given input */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., time, memory) */,
  "benchmark_environment" TEXT /* Details about the benchmarking environment */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the benchmarking process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the forum post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the forum post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "post_category" TEXT /* Category of the post (e.g., optimization, discussion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "comment_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_comment_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_parent_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm subtype */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm type */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_subtypes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_tags_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Brief review or comment along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
